key_files.relevance: FluxInferenceEngine.generate() already implements dimension rounding (lines 207-208) and center cropping (lines 239-245). GenerationResult already includes generated_width and generated_height fields.
GenerationResult dataclass already has optional generated_width and generated_height fields (lines 38-42).
BufferedImage dataclass already has optional generated_width and generated_height fields (lines 51-52).
GenerationWorker._run() already propagates generated_width and generated_height from GenerationResult to BufferedImage.
_save_with_metadata() already stores GeneratedWidth and GeneratedHeight in PNG tEXt chunks when present.
Metadata panel already has Generated Size and Final Size rows with correct IDs.
ImageRecord interface already has optional generatedWidth and generatedHeight fields.
parsePngMetadata() already extracts GeneratedWidth and GeneratedHeight from PNG tEXt chunks.
updateMetadataPanelFromRecord() already displays Generated Size and Final Size from record fields.
Comprehensive tests for dimension rounding and center cropping (TestDimensionRoundingAndCropping class).
Property-based tests for PNG metadata including GeneratedWidth and GeneratedHeight (TestPNGMetadataGeneration class).

patterns.name: Optional dimension fields with None default
patterns.description: Both GenerationResult and BufferedImage use Optional[int] = None pattern for generated dimensions to maintain backward compatibility.

patterns.name: PNG tEXt metadata chunks
patterns.description: Images are saved as PNG with metadata in tEXt chunks using PngImagePlugin.PngInfo(). Keys used: AspectRatio, Width, Height, Prompt, Model, Seed, GeneratedWidth, GeneratedHeight.

patterns.name: Center crop formula
patterns.description: Left/top offset: (generated_dim - final_dim) // 2; remainder goes to right/bottom.

similar_features.name: Aspect ratio metadata
similar_features.description: AspectRatio stored in PNG tEXt chunk, parsed in frontend, displayed in metadata panel.

architecture.data_flow: FluxInferenceEngine.generate() -> GenerationResult (with generated_dims) -> GenerationWorker -> BufferedImage (with generated_dims) -> ImageBuffer -> IPC handler -> save_to_preview (PNG tEXt) -> UI parsePngMetadata -> ImageRecord -> metadata panel
key_invariants: Generated dimensions are always multiples of 16
Final image size exactly matches requested dimensions
None generated dimensions means no dimension alignment occurred (backward compatibility)

extension_points.name: GenerationResult.generated_width/height
extension_points.description: Optional fields already added for engines to communicate dimension alignment.

extension_points.name: BufferedImage.generated_width/height
extension_points.description: Optional fields already added for pipeline metadata propagation.

testing.framework: pytest with hypothesis for property-based tests
testing.note: Tests require torch for flux inference tests; backend metadata tests need torch-free factory mock

conventions: Optional fields with None default for backward compatibility
PNG tEXt chunks for metadata storage
